name: Bravo Multinational Inc.
business: The Company plans to offer a wide range of on-demand content, including movies, series, concerts and original programming, at minimal or no cost to viewers. The service will be accessible across various devices via apps on Roku, Apple, and Google Play stores.
sellsTo: viewers seeking free or low-cost streaming

exposures.sentence: The Company plans to offer a wide range of on-demand content, including movies, series, concerts and original programming, at minimal or no cost to viewers.

Our plan is to create a streaming service that could offer a portion of its content for free, catering to the growing demographic of cord-cutters and aligning with the dynamic landscape of advertising-based video on demand (AVOD) streaming.

catalysts.event: Finalize MWP Entertainment Group LOI into definitive agreement
catalysts.sentence: As of the date of this filing, the LOI has yet to be finalized into a definitive agreement.

tamClaims.claim: Global video streaming market expected to reach $1.9 trillion by 2030 with CAGR 19.3%
tamClaims.sentence: A report from Fortune Business Insights, a global market research and reporting firm, estimated the global video streaming market at $455.45 billion in 2022. It is projected to grow from $554.33 billion in 2023 to $1.9 trillion by 2030, achieving a CAGR of 19.3% during the forecast period.
